skill1.note: Correct trigger; note flags skill1 was auto-filled from offline parser (blablalink prose), NOT hand-verified, but behavior-identical to prior runtime parse.

skill1.kitLine: Affects 2 allies with the highest final ATK

skill2.kitLine: Activates when there are above 5 enemy unit(s), excluding Nikkes. Affects self.
skill2.note: Deliberately inert: in a single-boss solo raid the >5-enemies condition is never met, so the parser correctly drops it. skill2 block array is empty by design, not a silent drop.
Folded into the single inert skill2 entry; never fires in single-boss scope.
Folded into the single inert skill2 entry; never fires in single-boss scope.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Change the weapon in use (weapon swap)
burst.note: Weapon-swap framing collapsed by PROBE FIX (run G): burst is ONE railgun shot, single 813.42% flatDamage per cast, replacing the old weaponSwap model that fired ~4 shots over 10s (was 1.93 HOT).
Modeled as the UNCHARGED 813.42% base. Kit-literal full-charge would be 2440% (x3 lever) — see documentedConfounds F1. flatDamage also strips crit+core (F2).
Subsumed by the single-shot cadence model; note states charge cadence is specified directly so no attackSpeedPct rider is needed.
The x3 full-charge lever; not applied to the flatDamage. This is the substance of finding F1 (potential 3x under-model if the real railgun hit is full-charged).
Consistent with the single-shot model; listed as unmodeled weapon-swap detail.

Pierce not expressed; related to finding F2 (flatDamage strips crit+core on the Pierce railgun roll). Partless single-boss scope limits Pierce relevance, but the crit/core strip is a live damage confound.

documentedConfounds.text: kit-status F1: burst hit modeled 813.42% (uncharged) vs kit-literal full-charge 2440% (x3 lever). Recipe: popup-read burst hit in run-G footage.
documentedConfounds.why: If the real railgun shot is full-charged, burst damage is under-modeled ~3x — a direct, large driver of the COLD reading. Unresolved measurement.

documentedConfounds.text: kit-status F2: flatDamage strips crit+core from the Pierce railgun rolls.
documentedConfounds.why: flatDamage bypasses crit and core multipliers on the burst shot, understating it. Independent under-model channel alongside F1.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst PROBE FIX (run G, was 1.93 HOT): single 813.42% flatDamage per cast replaces weaponSwap that fired ~4 shots over 10s at 2s charge.
documentedConfounds.why: Documented intentional correction of shot count; explains the swing from HOT toward COLD but the single-shot value itself is what F1/F2 question.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 (Crit Rate 4.83% + Crit Damage 13.91%) gated on >5 enemies, deliberately inactive.
documentedConfounds.why: Condition is never true in single-boss solo raid, so the buff never fires in-game either; dropping it is faithful, not a gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 auto-filled from offline parser (blablalink prose), NOT hand-verified; behavior-identical to prior runtime parse.
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance/verification caveat only; no mechanical divergence asserted. Values match the prose (4.48% / 43.1% / 10s).

documentedConfounds.text: kit-status residual: 'Over-corrected; reads 0.80 (G) but 1.17 (N6) — unstable, audit candidate.' Board records 0.6268 (PG iron/Electric) vs 1.2235 (N6 wind), MAD 0.298 (>15%).
documentedConfounds.why: Large comp-to-comp spread and over-correction indicate the single-shot burst model is not stable across teams; consistent with the unresolved F1/F2 burst modeling.

authorIntentSummary: The author reviewed the whole kit and deemed the parser faithful for all three slots, so nothing is overridden beyond materializing skill1. Skill1 is a fullBurstEnter buff to the top-2-final-ATK allies (Charge Speed 4.48% + ATK 43.1%, 10s), auto-filled from the offline parser and not hand-verified. Skill2 is deliberately left empty because its >5-enemies gate is never met in single-boss solo raid. The burst was reworked by a run-G PROBE FIX from a multi-shot weaponSwap (~4 shots, 1.93 HOT) into a single 813.42% flatDamage railgun shot per cast. Known-not-faithful spots, all documented and live: the burst uses the uncharged 813.42% rather than the kit-literal 2440% full-charge (F1, x3 lever) and flatDamage strips crit+core from the Pierce roll (F2) — both plausible drivers of the COLD/unstable board (0.925 mean, 0.63–1.22 spread, MAD 0.298).
